query:
UPDATE rangeCharts
SET sourceStatus = 'imported_unreviewed',
    sourcePanelLabel = 'Data present — PDF review pending',
    dataVersion = '2026-05-13-imported-v1'
WHERE sourceStatus IS NULL
  AND stackDepth != 20
  AND spotKey != 'TEST_BTN_RFI';

SELECT spotKey, stackDepth, sourceStatus FROM rangeCharts
WHERE sourceStatus = 'imported_unreviewed'
ORDER BY stackDepth, spotKey;

UPDATE rangeCharts
SET sourceStatus = 'imported_unreviewed',
    sourcePanelLabel = 'Data present — PDF review pending',
    dataVersion = '2026-05-13-imported-v1'
WHERE sourceStatus IS NULL
  AND stackDepth != 20
  AND spotKey != 'TEST_BTN_RFI';

SELECT spotKey, stackDepth, sourceStatus FROM rangeCharts
WHERE sourceStatus = 'imported_unreviewed'
ORDER BY stackDepth, spotKey;
